name: Yatsobi
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and set aside.
2. Fry the bacon and save the fat.
3. Boil water for the noodles.
4. In a frying pan, sauté chopped onions and garlic in bacon grease (about 2 tablespoons).
5. Add cabbage and carrots, stir-frying on high heat.
6. Add the ground beef to the pan.
7. Cook the Ramen noodles according to package instructions; drain.
8. Add bean sprouts and noodles to the meat and vegetable mixture.
9. Season to taste with soy sauce.
